zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh於1470年出生在英國英格蘭爾迪斯利時，她的父親Sir Knight Piers Legh IV28歲，母親Ellen Savage20歲。她於1494年7月5日與Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton在英國英格蘭爾迪斯利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和11個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年5月5日在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Baroness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Barsnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from a farmstead so named in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, possibly from a compound of the Old Norse personal name Baldrekr + nes ‘point, headland’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘languid’ in Hebrew), borne by the elder sister of Rachel (Genesis 29:23). Jacob served her father Laban for seven years in return for the hand of Rachel, but was deceived into marrying Leah first. He was then given Rachel as well, but had to labour seven more years afterwards. For a long time the name was mainly Jewish, although it also enjoyed some favour among the Puritans in the 16th century. It was taken up again in the 1980s and has been widely popular since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh was born in 1470, in Disley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Knight Piers Legh IV, was 28 and her mother, Ellen Savage, was 20. She married Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton on 5 July 1494, in Disley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 11 daughters. She died on 5 May 1545, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh est née en 1470, à Disley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Piers Legh IV, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ellen Savage, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton le 5 juillet 1494, à Disley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 11 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1545, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh 1470 in Disley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Knight Piers Legh IV 28 und ihre Mutter Ellen Savage 20. Sie hat am 5. Juli 1494 in Disley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1545 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton il 5 luglio 1494, nel Disley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 11 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Margaret de Leghが1470年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアディスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Piers Legh IVは28歳，母Ellen Savageは20歳であった。1494年7月5日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアディスリーでSir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poyntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年5月5日にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Knight Piers Legh IV(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Savage(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1494년 7월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 디슬리에서 Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 5월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh nasceu em 1470, em Disley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knight Piers Legh IV, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Savage, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton em 5 de julho de 1494, em Disley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 11 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh родилась в 1470 г. в местности дисли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Knight Piers Legh IV было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Savage, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton 5 июля 1494 г. в местности дисли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Она умерла 5 мая 1545 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.
